metadata-description: Arabic-first mentorship: code review, instant answers, and frontend growth with 24/7 AI.
landing-hero-headline-en: Your intelligent mentor for frontend craft
landing-hero-subheading: AI mentor, 24/7 - reviews your code, answers your questions, in Mentor's voice
landing-hero-cta-aria: Start using the platform for free
problem-subtitle: Fair question - let me be honest with you
problem-chatgpt-3: No memory - every chat starts from scratch
problem-chatgpt-5: Not built for the Arabic dev community
problem-devmentor-1: Answers from the docs you chose - exactly
problem-devmentor-2: Knows Next.js 15 and React 19 latest patterns
problem-devmentor-4: Focused on one stack - not a jack of all trades
problem-devmentor-5: Speaks Arabic like a real mentor
how-step-1-desc: Next.js 14 or 15? React 18 or 19? shadcn? Any combination you want - you decide.
how-step-2-desc: Upload the docs you actually use - React, Next.js, any library. The AI learns from them.
how-step-3-desc: The AI answers and reviews your code based on your sources exactly - not from thin air.
features-subtitle: A real mentor, not just a chatbot
features-1-desc: Ask any React or Next.js question anytime. The AI answers in Arabic based on the resources you chose - no generic replies.
features-2-desc: Submit your code and get a thorough review - it flags issues, explains why, and gives you the fixed code right away.
features-3-desc: Load any docs, rules, or best practices you work with. The AI learns from them and answers accordingly.
features-4-desc: It doesn't just say "there's an error here" - it explains why the bug happened and how to avoid it next time.
tracks-subtitle: Specialized in the stack you actually ship
tracks-next-desc: The core framework - App Router, Server Components, Streaming
tracks-react-desc: The UI library - Server Components, Actions, new hooks
tracks-ts-desc: Full type safety - strict mode, Zod integration
tracks-tailwind-desc: Utility-first styling - RTL support, dark mode built-in
tracks-supabase-desc: Database + Auth + Vector search - our RAG engine
tracks-footnote: + You can add any other library through your personal Knowledge Base
usecases-subtitle: For every developer who wants to level up
usecases-1-desc: Just starting with React and Next.js? The AI walks you through the code step by step and explains why something is wrong - not just fixes it.
usecases-2-desc: Have experience but want to make sure your code is senior-level? Get a full review before you push to GitHub.
usecases-3-desc: Teaching or reviewing your students' code? Use DevMentor AI as an assistant to deliver faster, more thorough feedback.
preview-chat-user: Review this code - I want to know if there's a dependency issue
preview-chat-ai: Found two key things - the useEffect dependency array is missing [userId], which can cause stale closure. Also, the async call needs an error boundary.
faq-a-1: Yes, the current version is fully free - start without entering a card.
faq-a-2: Yes, it's built for Arabic. It answers in Arabic and understands Arabic-English questions.
faq-q-3: How is it different from ChatGPT?
faq-a-3: ChatGPT is general - DevMentor AI is specialized in your stack and learns from the docs you choose.
faq-a-4: Yes, every conversation is saved to your account and you can return to it anytime.
faq-q-5: Can I add my own docs?
faq-a-5: Yes - this is one of the core features. Add any docs or rules and the AI learns from them.
faq-a-6: Right now it's specialized in the JavaScript ecosystem - React, Next.js, TypeScript. Coming soon: Python and more.
cta-subtitle: Join 80+ developers using DevMentor AI right now
chat-welcome-subtitle: Ready to help with any React or Next.js question, or paste your code and I'll review it with you.
chat-suggestion-1: Review my code and tell me what's wrong
chat-suggestion-2: What's the difference between useEffect and useLayoutEffect?
chat-suggestion-3: How do I implement authentication in Next.js 16?
chat-ai-disclaimer: This mentor is AI. Double-check important details and code before you rely on it.
chat-placeholder: Ask a question or paste your code here...
chat-send-hint: Enter to send • Shift+Enter for new line
chat-attachment-error-too-large: Each file must be under the limit (code/text 400 KB, images 2 MB)
chat-attachment-error-type: That file type is not supported - use text, code, or image files
chat-error: An error occurred - please try again
chat-insights-finish-stop-desc: The model returned a complete response.
chat-insights-finish-tool-desc: Generation paused so the model could call a tool.
chat-insights-finish-filter-desc: The provider's content filter stopped the response.
chat-insights-finish-other-desc: The model finished for an unspecified reason.
chat-truncated-banner-desc: It reached the maximum length. Send a follow-up like "continue" to keep going.
chat-rate-limit-banner-desc: The AI provider is throttling requests. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
chat-rate-limit-banner-desc-generic: The AI provider is throttling requests. Please slow down and try again in a moment.
chat-error-banner-desc: The AI service couldn't complete your request. Please try again.
login-subtitle: Continue with Google to reach your mentor in chat.
login-terms: By signing in you agree to the terms and acceptable use policy.
login-auth-error: We could not verify your account, please try again.
legal-privacy-intro: This page explains what DevMentor AI collects, why, and who processes it. We collect only what the service needs to run, and the app is in beta.
legal-privacy-s1-body: Google account basics (your name, email, and avatar) through Supabase Auth; the chat messages and sessions you create, stored in our database; a per-request log (your user ID, IP address, and a timestamp); and token-usage metadata for each response.
legal-privacy-s2-body: Account basics sign you in. Your messages and sessions power the chat and let you return to past conversations. The per-request log is used only for rate-limiting and abuse protection. Token-usage metadata helps us show usage and keep the service within limits.
legal-privacy-s3-body: Supabase handles authentication and database storage. Google Gemini generates responses and embeddings — your messages are sent to Google to produce answers, and web-search grounding may run searches based on your question. Vercel hosts the application.
legal-privacy-s4-body: We don't show ads, and we don't sell your data.
legal-privacy-s5-body: To request deletion of your account and chat data, email shamsmedhat1@gmail.com and we'll take care of it.
legal-privacy-s6-body: DevMentor AI is in beta. Data may be reset during the beta period, so don't treat your chat history here as permanent storage.
legal-privacy-s7-body: Questions about this policy? Email shamsmedhat1@gmail.com.
legal-terms-intro: DevMentor AI is a free, educational beta service for bootcamp students. By using it, you agree to these terms.
legal-terms-s1-body: DevMentor AI is an AI mentor for frontend developers, offered free during beta as a learning tool. Features may change or pause while we're in beta.
legal-terms-s2-body: The mentor is AI. Double-check important details and code before you rely on it. Verify answers before applying them to real work.
legal-terms-s3-body: Use the service for learning. Don't abuse it, and don't use it to create or share illegal content.
legal-terms-s4-body: Usage is rate-limited per user to keep the service available for everyone.
legal-terms-s5-body: We may suspend access for misuse or abuse of the service.
legal-terms-s6-body: You own the messages you send. We store them to provide your chat history, as described in the Privacy Policy.
legal-terms-s7-body: The service is provided "as is," without warranty of any kind. It's a beta learning tool, not professional advice.
legal-terms-s8-body: Questions about these terms? Email shamsmedhat1@gmail.com.
